prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (S36B44T4 engine) with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, and 106mm exducer, paired with custom 4-inch titanium downpipes (VRSF Competition) and a CSF high-flow intercooler with 4.5L core volume for sustained 850whp on E85 (100% ethanol blend) with MHD Stage 3+ flash and custom DME calibration by PTG (Performance Tuning Group).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with an MFactory 2-disc carbon clutch (4000Nm torque capacity), 3.91:1 M-Division limited-slip differential with 100% lockup under load, and a G-Power carbon driveshaft (200g lighter than OEM) to handle the increased torque without parasitic loss.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (F90-specific valving), MCS 3-way adjustable dampers with remote reservoirs, and a full polybush kit from 034Motorsport (subframe, control arms, and differential mounts) to eliminate deflection under 1.5G lateral loads, paired with H&R 20mm front and 15mm rear anti-roll bars for flat cornering.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (F90-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, aggressive front splitter, and a 3-piece GT-style rear wing (1,200mm span) for -120kg downforce at 200km/h, finished in BMW Individual Frozen Brilliant White with matte black accents.

Custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with quad 102mm outlets, integrated electronic bypass valves, and a secondary sound actuator for a 1,000Hz resonance frequency (adjustable via iDrive), paired with a G-Power front lip spoiler and carbon fiber side skirts for aerodynamic balance.

Interior transformation with full Alcantara retrim (Steinbauer Motorsport) including M5 Competition seats (heated/ventilated), a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport) with 4-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II), and a digital dash upgrade (MHD Pro Display) with real-time boost, AFR, and G-force readouts, finished with a carbon fiber shift knob (AC Schnitzer) and illuminated M5 logo door sills.
